name: Elara Dress
description: A feminine midi dress with a soft silhouette, square neckline, and subtle romantic detailing for daytime events and dinner occasions.
careInstructions: Cold gentle wash. Do not tumble dry.

name: Luna Top
description: A structured cotton top designed for an elegant everyday look. Pairs easily with skirts and tailored trousers.

name: Aria Skirt
description: A flowing mid-length skirt with a clean waistline and soft drape, suitable for both casual and elevated styling.
careInstructions: Cold gentle wash. Steam to reshape.

name: Selene Cardigan
description: A soft-touch cardigan with delicate buttons and a refined cropped fit for layering across seasons.
